## Type of change

- [ ] Decision-tree content (questions, results, citations)

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run validate-tree` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds locally
- [ ] Citations added for any new licensing rule (link to Microsoft Learn or other primary source)
- [ ] Manually exercised the affected path in `npm run dev`
